burden.dalyPerCapita: low mortality; impacts development and schooling

epidemiology.diagnosticCriteria: Height < -2 SD for age/sex or poor growth velocity; evaluate endocrine and systemic causes

publicHealthSystem.controlRate: Low to moderate; specialist access limited

regionalSpecificities.diagnosisCriteria: Primary care growth charts; referral for endocrine workup
regionalSpecificities.treatmentProtocol: Nutrition optimization, treat underlying disease; GH therapy for select cases
regionalSpecificities.regionalChallenges: Limited endocrine services and high stunting burden
regionalSpecificities.strongPoints: Large-scale nutrition programs and community health workers
